initial_candidates.sql:
WITH team_points AS (
    SELECT 
        m.season,
        t.team_name,
        l.league,
        l.country,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN m.home_team_id = t.id AND m.home_score > m.away_score THEN 3
                WHEN m.away_team_id = t.id AND m.away_score > m.home_score THEN 3
                WHEN m.home_score = m.away_score THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS total_points
    FROM matches m
    JOIN leagues l ON m.league_id = l.id
    JOIN teams t ON (m.home_team_id = t.id OR m.away_team_id = t.id)
    GROUP BY m.season, t.team_name, l.league, l.country
),
ranked_teams AS (
    SELECT 
        season,
        team_name,
        league,
        country,
        total_points,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY season ORDER BY total_points DESC) AS rn
    FROM team_points
)
SELECT 
    season,
    team_name,
    league,
    country,
    total_points
FROM ranked_teams
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY season ASC;

WITH team_points AS (
    SELECT 
        m.season,
        t.team_name,
        l.league,
        l.country,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN m.home_team_id = t.id AND m.home_score > m.away_score THEN 3
                WHEN m.home_team_id = t.id AND m.home_score = m.away_score THEN 1
                WHEN m.away_team_id = t.id AND m.away_score > m.home_score THEN 3
                WHEN m.away_team_id = t.id AND m.away_score = m.home_score THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS total_points
    FROM matches m
    JOIN leagues l ON m.league_id = l.id
    JOIN teams t ON (m.home_team_id = t.id OR m.away_team_id = t.id)
    GROUP BY m.season, t.team_name, l.league, l.country
),
ranked_teams AS (
    SELECT 
        season,
        team_name,
        league,
        country,
        total_points,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY season ORDER BY total_points DESC, team_name ASC) AS rn
    FROM team_points
)
SELECT 
    season,
    team_name,
    league,
    country,
    total_points
FROM ranked_teams
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY season ASC;

WITH team_points AS (
    SELECT 
        m.season,
        t.team_name,
        l.league,
        l.country,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN m.home_team_id = t.id AND m.home_score > m.away_score THEN 3
                WHEN m.home_team_id = t.id AND m.home_score = m.away_score THEN 1
                WHEN m.away_team_id = t.id AND m.away_score > m.home_score THEN 3
                WHEN m.away_team_id = t.id AND m.away_score = m.home_score THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS total_points
    FROM matches m
    JOIN leagues l ON m.league_id = l.id
    JOIN teams t ON (m.home_team_id = t.id OR m.away_team_id = t.id)
    GROUP BY m.season, t.team_name, l.league, l.country
),
ranked_teams AS (
    SELECT 
        season,
        team_name,
        league,
        country,
        total_points,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY season ORDER BY total_points DESC, team_name ASC) AS rank
    FROM team_points
)
SELECT 
    season,
    team_name,
    league,
    country,
    total_points
FROM ranked_teams
WHERE rank = 1
ORDER BY season ASC;

WITH team_points AS (
    SELECT 
        m.season,
        t.team_name,
        l.league,
        l.country,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN m.home_team_id = t.id AND m.home_score > m.away_score THEN 3
                WHEN m.home_team_id = t.id AND m.home_score = m.away_score THEN 1
                WHEN m.away_team_id = t.id AND m.away_score > m.home_score THEN 3
                WHEN m.away_team_id = t.id AND m.away_score = m.home_score THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS total_points
    FROM matches m
    JOIN teams t ON (m.home_team_id = t.id OR m.away_team_id = t.id)
    JOIN leagues l ON m.league_id = l.id
    GROUP BY m.season, t.team_name, l.league, l.country
),
champions AS (
    SELECT 
        season,
        team_name,
        league,
        country,
        total_points,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY season ORDER BY total_points DESC) AS rn
    FROM team_points
)
SELECT 
    season,
    team_name,
    league,
    country,
    total_points
FROM champions
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY season ASC;
